title: Unable to use podman machine os upgrade
body:
### Issue Description

Unable to upgrade podman machine os.

> podman machine os upgrade
Error: unknown flag: --host-version
See 'podman machine os --help'
Error: exit status 125

> podman machine os --help
Manage a Podman virtual machine's OS

Description:
  Manage a Podman virtual machine's operating system

Usage:
  podman machine os [command]

Available Commands:
  apply       Apply an OCI image to a Podman Machine's OS
  upgrade     Upgrade machine os

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. 
```shell
podman machine os upgrade
```


### Describe the results you received

```
Error: unknown flag: --host-version
See 'podman machine os --help'
Error: exit status 125
```

### Describe the results you expected

podman machine os is upgraded if there's a new version, otherwise nothing happens, not an error about a flag which doesn't exist for that command according to the help

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

Always happens

comments.body:
You do not have podman 6 inside the machine, the command must be supported inside.

Try using the os apply command to update to 6 or re-create the machine, this will only work for future updates not for updates from 5 to 6.
cc @baude

> You do not have podman 6 inside the machine, the command must be supported inside.
> 
> Try using the os apply command to update to 6 or re-create the machine, this will only work for future updates not for updates from 5 to 6. cc [@baude](https://github.com/baude)

It would have been great to be mentioned in the release notes. I suppose many people will be trying to upgrade their machines from 5 to 6 after the 6.0.0 release now.
